final_prompt.prompt:
Create a product shot of a decorative item placed on a cabinet beneath a home TV feature wall, with focus on the product.

Style/medium: photorealistic lifestyle product photography, clean and understated home décor editorial style
Composition: close-up shot centered on the product, shallow depth of field to isolate subject, eye-level angle, moderate telephoto lens to compress background naturally
Subject: the product sitting on a low cabinet surface, naturally integrated into the scene, visually prominent without being jarring
Scene/backdrop: home living room TV feature wall as soft background, cabinet surface in foreground, warm and tidy domestic interior
Lighting/mood: soft diffused ambient light, gentle and even, warm neutral color temperature, calm and inviting mood
Color palette: neutral warm tones dominating — off-white, warm grey, light wood — product as the visual anchor
Materials/textures: smooth cabinet surface, subtle wall texture softly out of focus in background
Constraints: product must be the clear focal point; background elements (TV wall, cabinet) serve as context only, not competing visually; no cluttered props
Avoid: harsh shadows, over-styled staging, busy background details in sharp focus, floating or unnatural product placement, wide-angle distortion
